topic: silla de oficina en Camí Fondo
items: silla de oficina en muy buen estado

variants.rationale: Safe v1 with VERY HIGH viral potential. Office chair is perfect for price-reveal format — viewers love guessing furniture prices. ENERGETICO's punchy delivery matches short format energy. MICRO structure keeps it tight for max completion rate. VALUE_PROPOSITION hook (not used in last 10) highlights the find's worth. GAMIFIED CTA drives comment velocity with price guessing.

Contrarian angle — 'should you actually take a street office chair?' REPORTERO's factual tone adds credibility to the educational pivot (what to check before taking furniture). PSP structure builds problem-solution-proof arc. FORBIDDEN_KNOWLEDGE hook creates pattern interrupt. Medium length for depth without losing attention.

Completely different pacing — minimal narration, contemplative cycling discovery of the chair as one of 3 hidden reveals in Camí Fondo. OBSERVADOR's sensory, reflective voice suits the quiet aesthetic. COLD OPEN drops viewer straight into the scene. POV hook and SELF-REFLECTION CTA create intimate viewer connection. Ambient audio-forward differentiates from the talky v1/v2.
